content: TanStack Query v5 breaking changes: (1) useQuery now takes single object only - no positional args. Old: useQuery(['key'], fn, opts). New: useQuery({ queryKey: ['key'], queryFn: fn, staleTime: Infinity }). (2) QueryClient setup: new QueryClient({ defaultOptions: { queries: { staleTime: Infinity, refetchOnWindowFocus: false } } }). (3) invalidateQueries: queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['resources', team] }) - returns Promise. staleTime: Infinity means data never auto-refetches, but invalidateQueries() still works to force refetch. (4) Wrap app in QueryClientProvider with client={queryClient}. (5) useIsFetching() hook to check active fetches for spinner state.
